payload.trend: AI adoption expanding in education and public sector
payload.description: AI integration is accelerating in education systems and public sector social impact initiatives, with deployments aimed at personalized learning, addressing achievement gaps, and supporting national job platforms.
AI tools are diversifying beyond enterprise use cases into consumer-focused applications such as career assistance, personal productivity, lifestyle management, and financial services.

payload.trend: AI-driven enhancements in digital marketing platforms
payload.description: AI capabilities are increasingly embedded in digital marketing tools to improve campaign performance and viewer engagement, reflecting a shift towards AI-augmented marketing strategies.
